name: bluenet
summary: Bluenet is code running on Crownstone compatible devices such as electronic connectors, electronic EU plugs and grid-powered beacons, Guidestones. Each Crownstone or Guidestone is a node in a network that uses signal strength for indoor localization of smartphones and wearables.

documentation.readme: Bluenet is code running on Crownstone compatible devices such as electronic connectors, electronic EU plugs and grid-powered beacons, Guidestones. Each Crownstone or Guidestone is a node in a network that uses signal strength for indoor localization of smartphones and wearables.
usage_sections: Features: - Made for indoor localization. - Includes a mesh network. - Power measuring. - iBeacon compliant. - Configurable over the air.
Usage: To use a device with bluenet code on it, you only need to know the Bluetooth protocol that bluenet uses. You can find the protocol definitions in the protocol document.
